title: Minecraft Compendium
description: Uses advancements to log information for the player. Look at mobs with your spyglass to add them to your Mobestiary, and discover biomes and structures!
body:
![Mobestiary image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65da0c47219aac3e0435c779bcd9da1415326a26.png)

# Minecraft Compendium
### _by Lasercraft32_
-----------------------------------------------------
### **IMPORTANT:** _This pack has a required resource pack! It won't work without it (be sure to click on the version's name intsead of just clicking "download" otherwise you'll miss it!)_

This data pack adds a bunch of advancements to log information for the player.
When you explore new biomes or structures, they will automatically be added to your
advancements tab. It also adds a mobestiary that you can log info into by looking
at mobs using a spyglass!

**There are advancements for every single biome, structure, and mob in the game!**

NOTE: _This pack only includes vanilla mobs, biomes, and structures._

If you have any questions, need extre info about my packs, or just want to hang out, then consider joining my public Discord: https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg
